source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The figure shows a circuit containing an ideal transformer, with ideal ammeters in the circuit. The three light bulbs have identical and constant resistance. The primary coil of the transformer is connected to a sinusoidal AC voltage with an effective value of 18 V, and when switch \( S \) is closed, all the bulbs light up. After switch \( S \) is opened, the reading of ammeter \( A_1 \) changes by 0.3 A, and the reading of ammeter \( A_2 \) changes by 0.6 A. Which of the following statements is correct?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: After switch \( S \) is opened, the power decrease of bulb \( L_2 \) is greater than 5.4 W

choice_map.A: The turns ratio of the primary to secondary coils of the transformer is 1:2
choice_map.B: After switch \( S \) is opened, the output voltage across the secondary coil increases
choice_map.C: After switch \( S \) is opened, the power of bulb \( L_1 \) decreases
choice_map.D: After switch \( S \) is opened, the power decrease of bulb \( L_2 \) is greater than 5.4 W
